scope: Complete enumeration of every WCF service host, service contract, operation contract, binding configuration, and installer service-account default in V4Kernel/src. Captures two hosts the prior review missed (TdmAcmNCLinkService, TdmDatabaseToolsService).

nodes_added.name: TdmNCLinkService
nodes_added.summary: Windows Service. netTcpBinding security=None. installer default LocalSystem. includeExceptionDetailInFaults=True. mexHttpBinding enabled. ServiceModName configurable (FMS in shipped config).

nodes_added.name: TdmMmsToolDataService
nodes_added.summary: Windows Service. netTcpBinding security=None. installer default LocalSystem. includeExceptionDetailInFaults=True. mexTcpBinding enabled. maxReceivedMessageSize=2MB.

nodes_added.name: TdmAcmNCLinkService
nodes_added.summary: Windows Service (clone of TdmNCLinkService with ServiceModName=ACM). Same security=None + LocalSystem default. UNIQUE: serviceMetadata httpGetEnabled=True (full WSDL fetchable over HTTP) — more permissive than TdmNCLinkService.

nodes_added.name: TdmDatabaseToolsService
nodes_added.summary: Console application (not a Windows Service). NetNamedPipeBinding with SecurityMode.None and MaxReceivedMessageSize=int.MaxValue. baseAddress is args[0]. Keep-alive is Console.ReadLine. Account = whoever launches it.

nodes_added.name: BAESystems.com.MAS.NCLink_TDM.iToolingServer
nodes_added.summary: 11 OperationContracts. Used by both TdmNCLinkService and TdmAcmNCLinkService. XmlDocument parameters on SetToolingRequirements, SisterUpdate, MessageResult. [XmlSerializerFormat] (not NetDataContractSerializer).

nodes_added.name: Fastems.Interface.TdmInterface.ITdmToolData
nodes_added.summary: 6 OperationContracts. Used by TdmMmsToolDataService. XmlDocument parameters on ToolUpdate, PresetRequest, UpdateNcProgramToolList. [XmlSerializerFormat]. Connect(string SystemName) is the canonical wire-driven SQLi entry traced in T01.c.

nodes_added.name: TdmMmsToolData.ITdmMmsToolData
nodes_added.summary: ~11 OperationContracts (count by grep; not all read individually). TDM-internal contract on TdmMmsToolDataService.

nodes_added.name: TdmDatabaseImportExportService.IDatabseImportExport
nodes_added.summary: 14 OperationContracts. CheckConnection/ExportToFile/ImportFromFile/CopyData all take caller-supplied DB connection strings and file paths. Effectively a SQL-anywhere proxy.

edges_added.note: netTcpBinding security=None at app.config:46-60. mexHttp at app.config:48.
Same contract as TdmNCLinkService but with serviceMetadata httpGetEnabled=True (full WSDL over HTTP).
T01.c traced this as the wire-driven SQLi entry — Connect(SystemName) → imms5Connect.scr.
Unique to ACM: serviceMetadata httpGetEnabled=True. The other two TCP services set httpGetEnabled=False.

notes: Two hosts (TdmAcmNCLinkService, TdmDatabaseToolsService) were absent from the prior review's M1 enumeration. The TdmDatabaseToolsService finding is materially different in threat model (named pipe vs. netTcp) and adds the SQL-anywhere-proxy primitive. ServiceModName=ACM is presumably for the ACM customer modification family (cf. ServiceModName=FMS for Fastems FMS). Whether any TDM deployment runs both TdmNCLinkService and TdmAcmNCLinkService simultaneously is a deployment-question not settled here.
